basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Birla Institute of Techniology and Science Pilani (BITS Pilani)
basic_details.short_information: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani (BITS Pilani) Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. Has been announced through the BITS Pilani Project Assistant Recruitment 2026. Candidates who possess a B.Sc / Diploma degree in Chemical / Petroleum / Mechanical Engineering and are conversant with procurement, welding, and fitting activities are eligible to apply for these Project Assistant vacancies. The email application process for BITS Pilani Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 has started and will remain open until 13 May 2026. Candidates can downl

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc / Diploma degree in Chemical /Petroleum/Mechanical engineering.
qualification.details: B.Sc / Diploma degree in Chemical /Petroleum/Mechanical engineering. Candidate should be conversant with the procurement, welding, and fitting types of activities.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 13-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BITS Pilani Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Project Assistant position at BITS Pilani is 13 May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a B.Sc or Diploma degree in Chemical, Petroleum, or Mechanical engineering. Additionally, familiarity with procurement, welding, and fitting activities is necessary.

faq.question: Q3. How will candidates be selected for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves two main stages: initial shortlisting of applications received, followed by an interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this Project Assistant recruitment at BITS Pilani.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Assistant role will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 20,000/- to Rs. 25,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process for the Project Assistant position at BITS Pilani is to be done via email. Candidates need to send their complete application to the designated email address.

faq.question: Q7. What are the key skills required for this role?
faq.answer: Besides the educational qualifications, candidates should be conversant with procurement, welding, and fitting types of activities, which are essential for the Project Assistant role.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the job location for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job location for this Project Assistant position is Hyderabad, Telangana.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job. The recruitment is for a Project Assistant position on a contract basis.
